name: Rémi Lapointe

career_goals.industry_preference: renewable energy, heat pumps, biomass, sustainability

background.family_background: Franco-American family from Madawaska, ME. Bilingual English/French.

perspective: Excited about renewable energy but frustrated that CHE 360 feels abstract — all textbook problems, no connection to real systems. Wants to see how thermo applies to heat pumps and biomass energy, which are growing industries in Maine.
